title: Post-Party Summary! Halliday G2 Released: Focused on Real-Time AI Assistance and Camera-Free Design
excerpt: Smart glasses brand Halliday officially launched its second-generation AI glasses Halliday G2 on July 21. The product is priced at $599 and is expected to start
content_html:
Smart glasses brand Halliday officially launched its second-generation AI glasses Halliday G2 on July 21. The product is priced at $599 and is expected to start shipping in September 2026.

Differing from traditional AI tools that focus on "post-meeting recording and summarization," Halliday G2 centers around a new Meeting Flow experience, emphasizing "real-time assistance" during communication:

  • Real-time Follow-up: Offers real-time subtitles and translation in over 45 languages, quick summaries, and information retrieval to help users keep up with the discussion;

  • Driving Decisions: Supports topic tracking, decision confirmation, and commitment checks, clearly defining the discussion direction, responsible parties, and follow-up actions;

  • Closed-loop Management: Provides reminders for pending issues before and during meetings, and automatically generates structured records after meetings.

In terms of hardware configuration and appearance, Halliday G2 does not include a camera design, avoiding privacy concerns related to photography, making it more suitable for sensitive scenarios such as confidential work and business communications. The product continues the philosophy of "everyday glasses first," featuring a stylish frame and supporting optional prescription lenses:

  • Display System: Equipped with dual-eye waveguide display technology and dual Micro-LED projection systems, with a peak brightness of up to 1,600 nits, single-eye resolution of 600×300, and the display area located above the field of view to ensure natural eye contact;

  • Audio and Battery Life: Features a 4-microphone array, supports voice pickup within a distance of up to 2 meters and can distinguish speakers, providing over 12 hours of daily battery life;

  • Multi-functional Experience: Integrates Halliday AI assistant, Cheatsheet (cue mode), Stealth Mode (low-light privacy display mode), and supports phone calls and music playback.

content_html_zh:
7月21日，智能眼镜品牌Halliday正式推出第二代AI眼镜Halliday G2。 该产品售价 599 美元，预计 2026 年 9 月开始发货。

与传统AI工具注重“会后记录和总结”不同，Halliday G2围绕全新Meeting Flow体验，强调沟通过程中的“实时协助”：

  • 实时跟进：提供超过45种语言的实时字幕和翻译、快速摘要和信息检索，帮助用户跟上讨论；
  • 驱动决策：支持主题跟踪、决策确认、承诺检查，明确讨论方向、责任方、后续行动；
  • 闭环管理：会前、会中提醒待处理问题，会后自动生成结构化记录。

在硬件配置和外观方面，Halliday G2没有摄像头设计，避免了与摄影相关的隐私问题，使其更适合机密工作和商务通信等敏感场景。 该产品延续了“日常眼镜优先”的理念，具有时尚的镜框并支持可选的处方镜片：

  • 显示系统：配备双眼波导显示技术和双Micro-LED投影系统，峰值亮度高达1600尼特，单眼分辨率600×300，显示区域位于视场上方，保证自然的目光接触；
  • 音频与续航：采用4麦克风阵列，支持最远2米范围内拾音并可区分说话者，每日续航时间超过12小时；
  • 多功能体验：集成Halliday AI助手、Cheatsheet（提示模式）、Stealth Mode（弱光隐私显示模式），支持通话和音乐播放。
